title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 01 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 01 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 01 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/12/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose today, the main contract I2401 closed 975.5. an increase of 1.99% throughout the day.Traders ship according to market conditions. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see.
